project_type: Python desktop app with CLI (Typer) + GUI (PySide6) for Salesforce STF translation workflow
build_system: setuptools with pyproject.toml, editable install via pip install -e '.[gui,dev]'
test_framework: pytest with pytest-qt for GUI tests, tests/ directory, 313+ tests passing
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' 2. pytest -q (all tests pass) 3. Run new tests specifically
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 default. PySide6 available for GUI tests.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns: frozen Entry dataclass, Document model, runner translate_document(). Tests in tests/ directory following pytest patterns.
key_patterns: Entry(key, label, translation, approved) frozen dataclass; Document.entries list; TranslationMemory SQLite-backed with get/put; Runner classify/fill/translate_one pattern; GUI AppState shared dataclass; Settings via QSettings; CLI via Typer app; Excel import/export with openpyxl; Columns: Key, Label, Translation, Approved, Do Not Translate
directory_structure: src/stx/ = main package, src/stx/gui/ = PySide6 GUI, src/stx/gui/pages/ = phase pages, src/stx/translate/ = translation backends+runner, src/stx/excel/ = Excel import/export, src/stx/stf/ = STF parser/writer, tests/ = pytest test files
